title: Vanilla Enhancements
description: Adds a couple new items and crafting recipes to make your experience better.
body:
This mod adds:
  Diamond Apple (slighly better than golden apples)
  Villager Nose (dropped from villagers)

Adds a crafting recipe for every spawn egg and music disc. The general format for the spawn eggs is an egg in the middle and the primary drop/related item completely surrounding it in the crafting table, but I'd still use [Just Enough Items](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) just for reference.
